articles.title: California Assembly passes 3D printer bill that would criminalize bypassing mandated gun-blocking software
articles.summary: California's Assembly has passed AB 2047, the California Firearm Printing Prevention Act, sending the amended bill to the state Senate.
articles.title_zh: 加州眾議院通過3D打印機法案，將非法規避強制槍支鎖定軟體
articles.summary_zh: 加州眾議院通過AB 2047《加州槍支列印預防法案》，並將修訂後的法案送交州參議院審議。

articles.title: A robot startup is wreaking havoc on short-term rentals in San Francisco — Airbnb hosts allege 'guests' secretly tested robots indoors, left the units completely trashed
articles.summary: Picture this: you're the owner of a dainty place in San Francisco. You put it up on Airbnb, considering the area is sprawling with AI bros, thinking you'd get a pretty good return on your investment. What you actually get in return are scratched kitchens, damaged appliances, bizarre rearrangements, and just straight up missing items.
articles.title_zh: 機器人新創公司在舊金山短租市場造成混亂——Airbnb房東聲稱「客人」秘密在室內測試機器人，留下滿目瘡痍
articles.summary_zh: 舊金山的Airbnb房東們遭遇機器人新創公司的測試，他們的房產遭受刮傷、電器損壞等嚴重破壞，投資回報遠低於預期。

articles.title: Upcoming Beats headphones teased by Lamine Yamal: New design, pink colorway
articles.summary: Last week, reports emerged around Apple developing a new pair of Beats over-ear headphones, with the FCC leaking an outline of the headphones, model number A3577. Now, leading into the world cup, Lamine Yamal has just openly teased the new Beats headphones in an Instagram post , likely to be a successor to Beats Studio Pro. more…
articles.title_zh: Lamine Yamal 預告即將推出的 Beats 耳機：新設計、粉紅配色
articles.summary_zh: Apple 正在開發新款 Beats 頭戴式耳機，型號 A3577 已被 FCC 洩露，球星 Lamine Yamal 日前在 Instagram 上預告了這款新耳機。

articles.title: Here’s one of my feature requests for Visual Intelligence in iOS 27
articles.summary: One of the core Apple Intelligence features to date has been Visual Intelligence. It started off in a r ather limited capacity through Camera Control, but with iOS 26, the company expanded it to screenshots. I’ve found those capabilities very useful thus far, and I’d love to see Apple take it even further with iOS 27. more…
articles.title_zh: 我對 iOS 27 Visual Intelligence 的一項功能要求
articles.summary_zh: Apple Intelligence 的核心功能 Visual Intelligence 已從 Camera Control 擴展到 iOS 26 的截圖功能，用戶希望 Apple 進一步擴展其能力。

articles.title: Here’s how Incogni helps you protect your family from scams and spam
articles.summary: We manage huge chunks of our life online these days, which means there is a mass of personal data entrusted to a range of different companies. You probably already use Apple privacy tools like App Tracking Transparency , Hide My Email , and iCloud Private Relay , but none of that helps with data that is already out there publicly exposed on the internet. Even things as seemingly innocuous as our hobbies and interests can be valuable data when it comes to those who want to try to sell us things or – worse – to scam us. more…
articles.title_zh: Incogni 如何幫助您保護家人免受詐騙和垃圾信息
articles.summary_zh: 雖然 Apple 提供了 App Tracking Transparency、Hide My Email 和 iCloud Private Relay 等隱私保護工具，但 Incogni 可以幫助防止個人數據被第三方公司濫用。

articles.title: Leaked photo compares Samsung’s wider Galaxy Z Fold 8 to the ‘Ultra’ one
articles.summary: A new leak shows off the difference, in person, of the Galaxy Z Fold 8’s wider form factor versus the “Ultra” one we’re already used to. more…
articles.title_zh: 洩露照片對比三星更寬的 Galaxy Z Fold 8 與「Ultra」款
articles.summary_zh: 新洩露的照片展示了 Galaxy Z Fold 8 更寬的屏幕形態與現有「Ultra」款式的實際差異。

articles.title: Ranked: The 4 things I look for in a smartphone
articles.summary: Credit: Sanuj Bhatia / Android Authority It’s easy to get caught up in all the marketing mojo by tech companies, trying to convince us that the latest features are something we can’t live without. Whenever I’m buying a new phone , I always step back and think about what I really want. What are my priorities — the specs and features I’m not willing to compromise on much. I have a list of four main things I look for in a smartphone, and I’ll share it with you in this post, starting with the most important one.
articles.title_zh: 排名：我在智能手機中尋找的 4 項功能
articles.summary_zh: 購買新手機時，應該理性思考自己的真實需求，而不是被科技公司的行銷宣傳所迷惑。

articles.title: Weekly poll: will you buy the Xiaomi 17T or the Xiaomi 17T Pro?
articles.summary: Last year, the Xiaomi 15T Pro easily won over the vanilla 15T in our poll. Now that the 17T generation has arrived, will history repeat itself? There is a good chance that it might not – the new vanilla model brings some key improvements that could improve its fortunes, but there are some issues too. The biggest issue may be the price – the Xiaomi 17T starts at €750, while the 17T Pro starts at €900 (for a 12/256GB phone in both cases). This is a €100 price hike compared to the 15T pair. We get it, everything has gotten more expensive, especially devices that need fast RAM and storage....
articles.title_zh: 週度投票：您會購買 Xiaomi 17T 還是 Xiaomi 17T Pro？
articles.summary_zh: 去年 Xiaomi 15T Pro 在投票中輕鬆擊敗標準版，今年新一代 17T 會重演歷史嗎？標準版帶來了關鍵升級，但也存在一些問題。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: Android 17 with better security and AirDrop support has people excited
articles.summary: Last week, we asked you about which announcements coming out of Google I/O had you buzzing with excitement – in general, but also specifically for the upcoming Android 17 update. Starting with the top-level question, Android 17 was by far the best thing demoed at I/O 2026. Not surprising, given our audience. But the ranking of the other options did surprise us – barely anyone cared about Wear OS 7. The smartwatches lost to Gemini Intelligence and Android Auto (which were essentially tied) and even the new Googlebook design (the Android-powered laptops) sparked more interest. Some...
articles.title_zh: 週度投票結果：改進安全性和 AirDrop 支持的 Android 17 令人興奮
articles.summary_zh: Google I/O 2026 上，Android 17 成為最令人期待的亮點，其改進的安全性和 AirDrop 支持功能獲得了廣泛關注。

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Galaxy A57 gets its first real discount, Galaxy A37 and S25 FE also on sale
articles.summary: It took a while, but the Samsung Galaxy A57 is finally up on Amazon – and it kicks things off with a $60 discount. That’s a bit less than the A37 discount, but it’s enough to shift the balance of power between the two. The A37 is the cheaper model and if you can live with 6GB of RAM and 128GB non-expandable storage, then yes, it is meaningfully cheaper. But the 256GB models of the A37 and A57 are currently only $10 apart. Samsung Galaxy A57 $60 off Read our review ...
articles.title_zh: 週度優惠：Galaxy A57 首次大幅降價，Galaxy A37 和 S25 FE 也在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy A57 在 Amazon 上首次降價 $60，Galaxy A37 也有折扣，使得低端機型的性價比更具競爭力。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch9's codename surfaces, might launch with a Classic model
articles.summary: Samsung launched the first "Classic" smartwatch with the Galaxy Watch4 in 2021, but it wasn't a part of all the Galaxy Watch lineups that arrived later, as Samsung launched the Classic model with alternate generations, meaning the Watch5 and Watch7 didn't have a Classic version, but the Watch6 and Watch8 series did. Considering that pattern, we weren't expecting Samsung to launch a Classic smartwatch this year, but a new development suggests that might not be the case. While looking at the code of a Wear OS update, the folks at Android Authority spotted what could be the codenames for the...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 代號浮出水面，可能推出 Classic 款式
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 可能在 Galaxy Watch9 中推出 Classic 款式，延續 Watch4 和 Watch6 交替推出 Classic 版本的傳統。

articles.title: Daniel Jalkut on AI
articles.title_zh: Daniel Jalkut 談 AI

articles.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
articles.summary: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.
articles.title_zh: 「真是笑話」：Github Copilot 新的代幣計費方式引發開發者不滿
articles.summary_zh: 微軟旗下 Github Copilot 的黃金時代似乎已經結束。

articles.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
articles.summary: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.
articles.title_zh: Meta 據報正在開發 AI 吊墜裝置
articles.summary_zh: Meta 似乎在 AI 驅動的硬體上做出重大投資。

articles.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
articles.summary: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.
articles.title_zh: 我試用了 Google 的 24/7 AI 助手 Gemini Spark，它實際上相當有用
articles.summary_zh: Gemini Spark 可幫助自動化日常任務，從收件箱摘要到本地活動規劃，但 Google 將其作為獨立產品的原因仍不明確。

articles.title: How a Nigerian Startup Became an Fintech Unicorn
articles.summary: African fintech unicorn Moniepoint was founded in 2015 and has grown into one of the continent's standout success stories. From powering payments for small businesses to building critical financial infrastructure, the company has scaled rapidly and earned its place among Africa's most valuable tech firms. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke to Felix Ike, the company's co-founder and CTO, about Moniepoint's journey from startup to unicorn, and what it takes to build at scale in Africa's fast-evolving tech landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 奈及利亞新創公司如何成為金融科技獨角獸
articles.summary_zh: 非洲金融科技獨角獸 Moniepoint 成立於 2015 年，已成長為非洲大陸的傑出成功案例之一。從為小型企業提供支付服務到構建關鍵金融基礎設施，該公司實現了快速擴展。

articles.title: China Factory Activity Worsens in Warning Sign for Economy
articles.summary: China’s factory activity slowed in May as disruptions from a five-day break added to pressures on global demand and input costs from the continuing conflict in the Middle East.
articles.title_zh: 中國工廠活動惡化，經濟前景警訊浮現
articles.summary_zh: 五一休假造成的中斷加上全球需求疲軟和中東衝突引發的投入成本上升壓力，導致中國五月份工廠活動放緩。

articles.title: SpaceX, OpenAI Windfall Fuels Bets on Next-Wave Asian AI Winners
articles.summary: The hunt is on for companies that could benefit from the tailwinds of an unprecedented wave of stock offerings in the US, and investors are increasingly honing in on the Asian supply chain.
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 和 OpenAI 帶動下一波亞洲 AI 贏家的投資熱潮
articles.summary_zh: 投資者正在尋找能從美國股票發行潮中受益的公司，越來越多人將目光投向亞洲供應鏈。

articles.title: SoftBank Plans Up to €75 Billion Investment in French AI Centers
articles.summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build 5 gigawatts of artificial intelligence data center capacity in France, saying the country is poised to become a top European hub for AI infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: 軟銀計畫在法國 AI 數據中心投資最高 750 億歐元
articles.summary_zh: 軟銀集團計劃投資最高 750 億歐元（870 億美元）在法國建造 5 GW 的人工智慧數據中心產能，認為法國將成為歐洲 AI 基礎設施的頂級樞紐。

articles.title: Core i7-14700F gaming PC with RTX 5060, 32GB of RAM, and 1TB of storage gets $470 discount — Newegg's ABS Cyclone Aqua prebuilt is $1,329 with code
articles.summary: Newegg's ABS Cyclone Aqua prebuilt combines Intel's 20-core Core i7-14700F with Nvidia's RTX 5060, and 32GB of DDR5 memory for less than the cost of building a comparable system
articles.title_zh: 搭載 RTX 5060、32GB 記憶體和 1TB 儲存的 Core i7-14700F 電競 PC 獲得 $470 折扣 — Newegg 的 ABS Cyclone Aqua 預組裝電腦售價 $1,329（需輸入優惠碼）
articles.summary_zh: Newegg 的 ABS Cyclone Aqua 預組裝電腦搭載 Intel 20 核心 Core i7-14700F、Nvidia RTX 5060 以及 32GB DDR5 記憶體，價格遠低於自組同等級系統的成本。

articles.title: SoftBank to spend up to $87 billion on French AI data centers — country offers ample nuclear grid that US sites lack
articles.summary: SoftBank carries over $130 billion in debt and took a $40 billion bridge loan in March to fund its latest OpenAI investment.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 計劃耗資高達 870 億美元建立法國 AI 資料中心 — 法國擁有美國站點所缺乏的充足核電網絡
articles.summary_zh: SoftBank 目前債務超過 1,300 億美元，並在三月時為最新的 OpenAI 投資獲得了 400 億美元的過橋貸款。

articles.title: New one-meter-cubed 3D printer pumps out large-scale prints at 3kg an hour — Modix MAMA-1000 also needs a big wallet with prices starting at $35,000
articles.summary: The MAMA-1000 pellet 3D printer from Modix prints with a whopping 3kg an hour throughput.
articles.title_zh: 新款邊長一米的 3D 列印機以每小時 3 公斤的速度製造大型列印品 — Modix MAMA-1000 價格不菲，起價為 $35,000
articles.summary_zh: 來自 Modix 的 MAMA-1000 顆粒 3D 列印機具有高達每小時 3 公斤的驚人列印輸出速度。

articles.title: Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x review: Snapdragon X2 Elite makes its case
articles.summary: The Yoga Slim 7x brings Snapdragon performance, long battery life, and an OLED display provided you’re fine with ARM apps and USB-C everything.
articles.title_zh: Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x 評測：Snapdragon X2 Elite 展現實力
articles.summary_zh: Yoga Slim 7x 提供 Snapdragon 效能、持久電池續航力和 OLED 顯示螢幕，前提是你能接受 ARM 應用程式和全 USB-C 連接。

articles.title: Microsoft veteran recalls the last time Nvidia and Arm was the future of Windows — shares a video of ‘the first time Windows ran on Nvidia Tegra Arm’ from 2010
articles.summary: Microsoft veteran Steven Sinofsky is here to remind folks that excitement about a new PC era fueled by Nvidia and Arm culminated in the Surface RT 16 years ago.
articles.title_zh: 微軟資深員工回憶 Nvidia 和 Arm 曾是 Windows 未來的時代 — 分享 2010 年「Windows 首次在 Nvidia Tegra Arm 上運行」的影片
articles.summary_zh: 微軟資深員工 Steven Sinofsky 提醒大家，16 年前 Nvidia 和 Arm 驅動的新電腦時代熱潮最終導致了 Surface RT 的出現。

articles.title: New AI-compute cryptocurrency Pearl sparks a GPU mining rush but profitability is already sliding — RTX 5090 daily revenue has halved to $17.19 since April
articles.summary: A new cryptocurrency called Pearl has set off a short-lived GPU mining rush.
articles.title_zh: 新型 AI 運算加密貨幣 Pearl 引發 GPU 挖礦潮但獲利已開始下滑 — RTX 5090 日收益自四月起已減半至 $17.19
articles.summary_zh: 一種名為 Pearl 的新加密貨幣掀起了曇花一現的 GPU 挖礦熱潮。

articles.title: The 'ultimate mosquito killer' uses lasers and AI — custom model trained to detect and lock lasers on these pests
articles.summary: A computer vision and robotics expert has created and trained what he boasts is “the ultimate mosquito killer” using machine learning and a laser.
articles.title_zh: 「終極蚊子殺手」採用雷射和 AI — 訓練自訂模型以偵測並追蹤鎖定這些害蟲
articles.summary_zh: 一位電腦視覺和機器人專家利用機器學習和雷射技術開發並訓練了一款他標榜為「終極蚊子殺手」的系統。

articles.title: Orpheus II ISA soundcard returns due to ‘popular demand’ — aimed at DOS and early Windows users, this card includes hardware to support every major audio standard
articles.summary: Want real Sound Blaster, Gravis UltraSound, OPL3 FM synthesis, and MPU-401 MIDI support? You got it.
articles.title_zh: Orpheus II ISA 音效卡因「大眾需求」回歸 — 專為 DOS 和早期 Windows 使用者設計，該卡包含支援所有主流音訊標準的硬體
articles.summary_zh: 想要真正的 Sound Blaster、Gravis UltraSound、OPL3 FM 合成和 MPU-401 MIDI 支援？通通有。

articles.title: You can still run the original Nvidia Control Panel by grabbing it from the Microsoft Store today — app remains useful to adjust a handful of RTX Pro and Quadro features, and may be handy for troubleshooting
articles.summary: The old Nvidia Control Panel is now a separate, optional download, but is it worth grabbing?
articles.title_zh: 你仍可透過 Microsoft Store 取得原始 Nvidia 控制面板 — 該應用程式仍可用於調整少數 RTX Pro 和 Quadro 功能，並可能有助於疑難排解
articles.summary_zh: 舊版 Nvidia 控制面板現已成為獨立的可選下載項目，但值得安裝嗎？

articles.title: Bill Gates once starred in a bizarre Doom promo to push Windows 95 back in 1993 — tech mogul wore a trench coat, wielded a shotgun, and shot a demon, saying 'Who do you want to execute today?'
articles.summary: Bill Gates gives a possessed Doom heavy weapon dude both barrels in a rediscovered Windows 95 plus DirectX gaming presentation.
articles.title_zh: 比爾蓋茲曾在 1993 年的奇特 Doom 宣傳中亮相以推廣 Windows 95 — 這位科技大亨穿著風衣、手持霰彈槍、射擊惡魔，並說「你想執行誰？」
articles.summary_zh: 比爾蓋茲在一段重新發現的 Windows 95 加上 DirectX 遊戲演講中，向被附身的 Doom 敵人連開兩槍。

articles.title: Apple AI glasses launch pushed back to late 2027, Vision Air to arrive by 2029: report
articles.summary: Apple has been working on AI smart glasses for a little while, both to compete against Meta Ray-Bans and to provide a hardware platform for Siri and its Visual Intelligence features. While they were originally set to be announced at the end of this year and debut early next year, that’s now been delayed, with a launch now set to take place by the end of 2027, per Bloomberg . On the flip side of things, a cheaper and lighter version of Apple Vision Pro, dubbed Vision Air, may arrive as soon as 2028, potentially 2029. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple AI智能眼鏡發佈延至2027年末，Vision Air預計2029年推出：報告
articles.summary_zh: Apple一直在開發AI智能眼鏡以對抗Meta Ray-Bans並為Siri及其Visual Intelligence功能提供硬體平台。原定於年底發佈、明年初推出的計畫已被延遲。

articles.title: Report: New Apple TV, HomePod mini set to launch this fall; Siri Remote ‘refresh’ possible
articles.summary: According to the HomePod mini later this year – alongside the long-awaited release of next-generation Siri in iOS 27. These devices will largely be chip upgrades, though the Apple TV 4K may get an updated Siri Remote. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：新款Apple TV和HomePod mini將於今秋發佈；Siri Remote可能進行更新
articles.summary_zh: 新款Apple TV和HomePod mini預計今年秋季發佈，同時推出下一代Siri（iOS 27）。這些裝置主要將進行晶片升級，Apple TV 4K可能配備更新的Siri Remote。

articles.title: Apple TV 4K on track to break a record no one wants to see happen
articles.summary: It makes sense that Apple TV 4K customers are vocal about the lack of new hardware. The current set-top box , introduced in 2022, runs the risk of breaking a record no one wants to see happen. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple TV 4K將打破一項沒人樂見的紀錄
articles.summary_zh: Apple TV 4K客戶對硬體更新缺乏表示不滿。這款2022年推出的機頂盒面臨打破一項沒人樂見的紀錄的風險。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘NextThere’ helps you navigate public transit with rich insights
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Navigating across different cities and figuring out their public transportation can sometimes be a bit messy. Maps apps might not always have the best information, or the apps that do exist aren’t presenting data in a super readable manner. NextThere aims to tackle that problem, and also packs loads of historical data for providing more informed information regarding delays, on-time performance, and so on. It’s great for tourists and frequent commuters alike. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'NextThere'助你深入瞭解公共交通導航
articles.summary_zh: 本週的獨立應用聚焦介紹NextThere應用，幫助使用者在不同城市導航及瞭解當地公共交通。開發者如有意見請聯絡。

articles.title: Sihoo’s ergonmic office chair moves with you, and it’s the best option under $500
articles.summary: “Lumbar” support has been the bane of the ergonomic office chair market for years, with the supposed promise of a pain-free experience for hundreds of dollars. Sihoo sought out a change, and the result is an ergonomic office chair with full-body adaptive support for just under $500. more…
articles.title_zh: Sihoo人體工學辦公椅隨你而動，500美元以下最佳選擇
articles.summary_zh: Sihoo推出了一款具有全身自適應支撐的人體工學辦公椅，價格不到500美元，打破了傳統「腰椎」支撐的市場現狀。

articles.title: These are the 5 best Android apps I use that aren’t on the Play Store
articles.summary: Credit: Pankil Shah / Android Authority For most Android users, the Play Store is the only place they ever look for apps, and honestly, that’s how I used Android for years, too. But over time, I realized that some of the most interesting Android apps aren’t actually available on the Play Store at all. Some are not listed because they violate Google’s policies, while others are simply too niche or developed by small open-source communities that simply don’t care about Play Store distribution. Ironically, that’s also where I’ve found some of my favorite Android apps in recent years. And the best part is that all these apps are completely free and open source . Here are a few of my favorites.
articles.title_zh: 這5款最佳Android應用不在Play Store上
articles.summary_zh: 大多數Android用戶只在Play Store尋找應用，但一些最有趣的Android應用實際上在Play Store上並不可用。

articles.title: I’m trying to cut down my subscriptions, but I still gladly pay for these apps
articles.summary: Credit: Mitja Rutnik / Android Authority Gemini , Headspace, Todoist, and YouTube Music are just a few of the apps I used to pay for and have now ditched. I’m trying to lower my monthly subscription bill, and while it’s easier said than done, I’ve managed to bring the list down to just three. The three apps I still pay for I use daily, and for now, I don’t see myself ditching them. They are well worth the money because they help me get things done and even offer complete privacy — at least two of them.
articles.title_zh: 我想減少訂閱，但我仍然樂意為這些應用付費
articles.summary_zh: 雖然降低月訂閱費用說來容易做來難，但作者已成功將訂閱清單減少到三個應用，包括Gemini、Headspace、Todoist和YouTube Music等。

articles.title: Are the big 3 carriers teaming up to stop Starlink? It sure looks like it
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority This month, Verizon, AT&T, and T-Mobile announced a joint effort to provide direct-to-device satellite connectivity and improve backup service during emergencies and natural disasters. According to Verizon, the effort would pool satellite spectrum resources across all three networks, enabling a more consistent experience when using satellite backup. One name conspicuously absent from the announcement: Starlink. The timing is interesting.
articles.title_zh: 三大運營商聯合對抗Starlink？看起來確實如此
articles.summary_zh: Verizon、AT&T和T-Mobile聯合推出直連衛星連接服務，以改善緊急情況下的備用服務。該舉措將共享衛星頻譜資源。

articles.title: I hate mobile games, but I’ve been playing this one for years
articles.summary: Credit: Mitja Rutnik / Android Authority I’m not a proper gamer. I never was one, and I don’t see myself becoming one either. I’ve tried several popular titles on Android and usually got bored a few minutes in. The games these days tend to be too complicated or just unappealing in more ways than one. For me, at least. However, despite my hate for mobile games, I still have one installed on my phone. Just one, and it’s been on my device for years. Sure, I don’t play it all that often, but I do open it every now and then when I have a few minutes to spare and need something to distract my mind. It’s the popular Alto’s Odyssey that most gamers likely already know, and it’s the best option for a non-gamer like me.
articles.title_zh: 我討厭手機遊戲，但我已經玩這款好幾年了
articles.summary_zh: 作為非正式遊戲玩家，大多數Android熱門遊戲都難以吸引注意力，但有一款遊戲卻讓人長期沉迷。

articles.title: I found an app that’s basically Good Lock for my Pixel — and I can’t live without it
articles.summary: As a part-time Google Pixel user, there’s one thing I miss dearly when switching over from my Samsung phone: Good Lock . The customization suite has become such an integral part of my One UI setup that I’d find it tough to adjust to a stock Samsung experience. Needless to say, it’s always quite a shock when moving from Galaxy to Pixel. Google doesn’t offer users a Good Lock equivalent for Pixels, and this is certainly one of the platform’s bigger oversights. I’d love to adjust various swipe triggers, tinker with my recents screen layout, and fine-tune themes and visuals. While we’ll probably never see a similar app on Google’s platform, this hasn’t stopped third-party developers from trying.
articles.title_zh: 我找到了一款基本上是Pixel版Good Lock的應用——我離不開它
articles.summary_zh: 作為Google Pixel兼職用戶，從Samsung手機切換時最懷念Good Lock自訂套件，而現在找到了Pixel的替代方案。

articles.title: Google isn’t the one ruining Android. It’s the apps you use every day
articles.summary: A recent report found that the US smartphone market is shrinking, and Android phones are taking the biggest hit. Despite rising prices and stock issues, iPhones continue to sell well while Android’s market share keeps slipping. You can point to a lot of reasons for this, including Apple’s ecosystem advantages and features like iMessage. But one of the biggest reasons, at least in my opinion, is the inconsistent experience people still have on Android phones .
articles.title_zh: 破壞Android的不是Google，而是你每天使用的應用
articles.summary_zh: 最新報告顯示美國智慧手機市場萎縮，Android受衝擊最大，而iPhone仍持續熱銷，Android市佔率持續下滑。

articles.title: As Kindle gets more restrictive, this Android E-Ink tablet feels refreshingly open
articles.summary: As Amazon’s Kindle ecosystem increasingly feels designed to keep users within its walls, BOOX continues to carve out a very different niche. After a few weeks with the Boox Go 10.3 Gen II (), it’s hard not to see the tablet as one of the more compelling Kindle Scribe alternatives. The device doesn’t try to replace my tablet or usurp my compact e-reader, but it also isn’t stripped down to a bare-bones writing slab either. Instead, BOOX pairs a sharp monochrome E-Ink display and lightweight design with enough Android flexibility to deliver a genuinely useful device for reading and writing. Focused by design
articles.title_zh: 隨著Kindle變得更具限制性，這款Android E Ink平板電腦令人耳目一新
articles.summary_zh: Amazon的Kindle生態系統越來越令人感到受限，而Boox則開闢了不同的市場空間。Boox Go 10.3 Gen II是一款引人注目的Kindle Scribe替代產品。

articles.title: I used Gemini and Claude as recipe apps, and only one was actually helpful
articles.summary: Most people use AI tools to replace or augment productivity apps , but I take a more personalized approach to testing these chatbots. I like to look for ways they can make general tasks more convenient, from finding new songs to getting accessible summaries of topics I’m interested in from trusted sources. Recently, I’ve had to expand my cooking repertoire, and I found myself wasting hours trying to find the perfect recipes that suited my needs and preferences. So I decided to turn to Gemini and Claude to see if they could streamline the process. As a result, I ended up with my new favorite cooking app.
articles.title_zh: 我將Gemini和Claude作為食譜應用使用，只有一個真正有幫助
articles.summary_zh: 作者測試AI工具不僅用於替代或增強生產力應用，而是尋找它們在日常任務中的便利方式，如Gemini和Claude作為食譜應用的表現。

articles.title: This is a make-or-break year for Google’s smart home line-up
articles.summary: Google’s smart home line-up has been in limbo since 2024, when the company introduced the Google TV Streamer and Nest Learning Thermostat. But on paper, the ecosystem has been stalling for far longer than that. We only had the Pixel Tablet, Nest Wifi Pro, and Nest Doorbell in the two years prior, and the last time Google ever thought about putting a smart speaker or display in our homes was in 2021 with the Nest Hub (2nd gen). While updates to the Google Home app have made it more interesting to use, that was a laudable improvement in 2023. We’re three years later now, and all we have to show for it is an app that works slightly better, has nicer automations, and… Gemini?! I guess we have Gemini. Yet, complaints about the entire Google Home ecosystem , from speakers to voice assistants, ha
articles.title_zh: 這是Google智慧家居產品線的成敗之年
articles.summary_zh: Google智慧家居產品線自2024年推出Google TV Streamer和Nest Learning Thermostat後陷入困境，生態系統長期停滯。

articles.title: I don’t trust the Galaxy S27 Pro rumors, and neither should you
articles.summary: Rumors surrounding next year’s Galaxy S27 series have already begun, and the one that immediately caught my eye is the Galaxy S27 Pro — a phone that would have many of the Ultra model’s specs in a smaller size. I would love for the Galaxy S27 Pro to exist, but based on previous experience, I’m not going to get my hopes up. Here’s why you shouldn’t either.
articles.title_zh: 我不相信Galaxy S27 Pro傳聞，你也不應該
articles.summary_zh: 關於Galaxy S27系列的傳聞已開始出現，包括可能推出具有Ultra款規格的更小尺寸Galaxy S27 Pro，但基於過往經驗，這令人存疑。

articles.title: Xiaomi Sound Play hands-on
articles.summary: The Xiaomi Sound Play is an 18W Bluetooth speaker that's both functional and looks great. It comes in Black, White, Purple, and Green, and costs €50. The speaker weighs 415 grams and is IP68-rated, so you shouldn't worry about dust and water inclusion. There's TWS stereo pair support, so you can set up two to get stereo sound. And there's also Auracast support, so you can pair up to 100 speakers to play simultaneously. There are three buttons on the front: volume up, play/pause, and volume down. Then, on the back, you get a covered USB-C port, a Power and Bluetooth button, the...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi Sound Play動手玩
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi Sound Play是一款18W藍牙揚聲器，功能齊全且外觀精美，有四種顏色選擇，€50的價格，415克重量，IP68防護等級，支援TWS立體聲配對。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Xiaomi 17T duo go on sale with price cuts, plus discounts on Galaxy S26 Ultra, iPhone Air and more
articles.summary: Xiaomi unveiled the 17T and 17T Pro earlier this week and both phones are now available for purchase on Amazon UK. Better yet, both smartphones have received launch discounts as well. Meanwhile, deals are also available on select Samsung Galaxy models, Google's Pixel 10 and Pixel 10a, and the Nothing Phone (3). The Xiaomi 17T gets £150 off its price, whereas the Xiaomi 17T Pro gets a £200 discount. Customers will be able to receive the discount during checkout. Xiaomi 17T £150 off at checkout Read...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Xiaomi 17T系列降價促銷，Galaxy S26 Ultra、iPhone Air等設備也有折扣
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi本週推出的17T和17T Pro已在Amazon UK上市並享有發佈優惠。同時Samsung Galaxy機型、Google Pixel 10和Pixel 10a、Nothing設備也有促銷。

articles.title: Oppo Reno16, Xiaomi 17T, RedMagic 11S Pro unveiled, Week 22 in review
articles.summary: Oppo unveiled the Reno16 series in China. The Reno16 and Reno16 Pro both share a 200MP 24mm, 50MP 80mm, and 50MP 16mm camera setup, with a 50MP 18mm selfie camera up front. Where they differ is in display, SoC, and battery. The Reno16 has a 6.32-inch screen, Dimensity 8500 Super, and a 6,700mAh battery with 80W wired charging. The 16 Pro has a 6.78-inch screen, a Dimensity 9500s, and a 7,000mAh battery with 80W wired and 50W wireless charging. Both phones are on sale in China, starting at CNY 3,499 ($515) and CNY 4,499 ($660) for the 16 and 16 Pro in their 12/256GB configs. The RedMagic...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Reno16、Xiaomi 17T、RedMagic 11S Pro發佈，第22週回顧
articles.summary_zh: Oppo在中國推出Reno16系列，Reno16和Reno16 Pro均配備200MP 24mm、50MP 80mm和50MP 16mm攝像頭，而Reno16具有6.32英寸屏幕、Dimensity 8500 Super晶片和6,700mAh電池。

articles.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
articles.summary: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 表示將投資最多 75 億歐元在法國建設數據中心
articles.summary_zh: 該公司表示目標是開發和運營最多 5 GB 的額外數據中心容量。

articles.title: The DIY platform trap that’s burning out engineering teams
articles.summary: Platform engineers are some of the most resourceful people in IT. Give them a problem, and they’ll automate their way toward a solution. But what happens when the automation itself becomes the problem? This is the quiet crisis hiding inside many organizations today. In the race to reduce toil, teams have built what amounts to a mountain of automation. Scripts, layered on blueprints, layered on orchestration workflows, layered on tooling, APIs, GitOps, and infrastructure and label it a “platform.” This isn’t a platform; it’s complexity dressed up in a better outfit. Trading one problem for another Here’s the dirty secret about using automation to build your own platform stack: you don’t actually eliminate complexity; you just become responsible for
articles.title_zh: 自動化平台的陷阱：工程團隊的過度消耗
articles.summary_zh: 平台工程師通過自動化解決問題，但當自動化本身成為問題時，許多組織面臨著隱藏的危機。

articles.title: I tested Cursor’s new Jira integration and it’s 5 stars, no notes. Here’s why.
articles.summary: Cursor launched its Jira integration last week. The integration was marketed as simple: assign a ticket in Jira and Cursor will handle it. No context switching, no copying or pasting. Welcome to the new new vibe coding era where the ticket is the prompt. Welcome to the new new vibe coding era, where the ticket is the prompt. That sounds suspiciously easy. Was it as easy in practice? I ran four tests, two with clearly written and two vague tickets. I asked Cursor to fix two bugs and write two features. My goal was to determine whether ticket quality affected Cursor’s outcome. Integration Let’s talk paywalls. The Cursor/Jira integration isn’t available with the free tools. When I tried to upgrade my Jira account, I noticed it automatically gave me one month free upon sign-u
articles.title_zh: 我測試了 Cursor 的新 Jira 整合，五星好評。原因如下。
articles.summary_zh: Cursor 推出的 Jira 整合讓開發者無需切換上下文或複製貼上，直接將 Jira 票據作為提示詞進行編程。

articles.title: M-Audio M Track Duo HD Producer Pack Review: Hot Takes, Cold Opens
articles.summary: The M-Track Duo HD Producer Pack removes the last remaining excuse for terrible audio and potentially terrible opinions.
articles.title_zh: M-Audio M Track Duo HD Producer Pack 評測：熱門觀點、冷開場
articles.summary_zh: M-Track Duo HD Producer Pack 消除了音訊品質不佳的最後藉口。

articles.title: Wi-Fi Router vs. Mesh System: Which Is Best for You?
articles.summary: Find out whether a single Wi-Fi router or a mesh system makes the most sense for your home network.
articles.title_zh: Wi-Fi 路由器 vs. Mesh 系統：哪個最適合你？
articles.summary_zh: 了解單一 Wi-Fi 路由器或 Mesh 系統哪個最適合你的家庭網路。

articles.title: 6 Best Prepaid Phone Plans (2026): Tello, Boost, Google Fi, More
articles.summary: Forget the pricey, postpaid cell plans and two-year contracts. Save with one of these WIRED-tested options from US Mobile, Boost, and Google Fi.
articles.title_zh: 6 款最佳預付費電話計畫（2026）：Tello、Boost、Google Fi 等
articles.summary_zh: 忘掉昂貴的後付費計畫和兩年合約，改用 US Mobile、Boost 和 Google Fi 等 WIRED 測試選項來省錢。

articles.title: Best Unlimited Phone Plan: T-Mobile, AT&T, Verizon Compared
articles.summary: I sifted through the fine print and figured out how to score the best deal right now on all the major carriers.
articles.title_zh: 最佳無限電話計畫：T-Mobile、AT&T、Verizon 比較
articles.summary_zh: 我詳細分析了合約細節，找到了如何在所有主要電信商獲得最優惠價格的方法。

articles.title: How Turkey Hacked the Hair Transplant Industry
articles.summary: From specialized motors to the use of machine learning algorithms, Turkey’s billion-dollar hair-transplant industry is the result of a constant process of innovation.
articles.title_zh: 土耳其如何駭入植髮產業
articles.summary_zh: 從專用馬達到機器學習演算法的應用，土耳其價值數十億美元的植髮產業是持續創新的成果。

articles.title: Indian Exam Board Admits to Cybersecurity Flaws Found by Teen
articles.summary: A national school exam board in India said it has been monitoring and has contained vulnerabilities in its online grading portal for one of the country’s most important school-leaving exams that were first flagged by a teenage cybersecurity researcher.
articles.title_zh: 印度考試委員會承認青少年發現的網路安全漏洞
articles.summary_zh: 印度一家全國學校考試委員會表示已監控並封鎖了其線上評分系統的漏洞，這些漏洞最初由一名青少年網路安全研究人員發現。

articles.title: Apple Seeks to Disrupt the Glasses Market the Way It Did With Watches
articles.summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27, iOS 28, new Apple TV and HomePod mini.
articles.title_zh: Apple 尋求以手錶方式顛覆眼鏡市場
articles.summary_zh: 另外還有關於 iOS 27、iOS 28、新 Apple TV 和 HomePod mini 的最新消息。

articles.title: Big Tech Is Suddenly Impacting Niche Market for US Dividends
articles.summary: The dominance of a few technology giants in the benchmark S&P 500 Index is now carrying over into the niche market for dividend futures and options.
articles.title_zh: 大型科技公司突然影響美國股息小眾市場
articles.summary_zh: 少數科技巨頭在標普 500 指數中的主導地位現已延伸到股息期貨和選擇權的小眾市場。

articles.title: On its 40th anniversary, we reassess 1986's SpaceCamp
articles.summary: Forty years ago, the future seemed just around the corner—and the vehicle that was going to take us there was NASA's Space Shuttle. Originally envisioned as part of a larger integrated space transportation system , the shuttle was billed as a fully reusable vehicle, totally unlike the one-and-done capsules of the fading Apollo era, capable of making monthly (and perhaps even weekly) ferry flights to low Earth orbit. The shuttle, it was hoped, would transform human space flight from extraordinary to mundane. Brands like Coke and Pepsi were quick to hop aboard and expand the Cola Wars into space , and there were even plans to blast Sesame Street's Big Bird into orbit . The loss of Challenger in January 1986—carrying educator Christa McAuliffe, who would have been the first private citizen in
articles.title_zh: 在成立 40 週年之際，我們重新評估 1986 年的 SpaceCamp
articles.summary_zh: 四十年前，未來似乎近在咫尺，而帶我們到達那裡的工具是 NASA 的太空梭。

articles.title: They call it stupid hot for a reason: Heat muddles animal brains
articles.summary: On a blazing hot day in South Africa, female southern pied babblers can’t think straight. The medium-sized black-and-white birds are trying to get at tasty mealworms behind a see-through barrier. On cooler days, the birds can quickly figure out that all they have to do is go around the small wall of plastic. But when the mercury goes up, the birds just keep stubbornly pecking at the barrier. That experiment is part of a growing body of research showing that animals get their minds muddled during heat waves. When it’s hot outside, birds struggle to learn, dogs bite more often, goat-like chamois pick fights. This is bad news not just for those who get on Fido’s toasted nerves. If the animals can’t stay alert enough to find food or avoid predators, their chances of survival go downhill, says
articles.title_zh: 人們說炎熱有原因：高溫會混亂動物的大腦
articles.summary_zh: 在南非的炎熱日子裡，母性南方簇冠鴉無法思考清楚，這些中等身型的黑白鳥類試圖越過透明屏障取得美味的麵包蟲。

articles.title: 駭客假借提供常見系統工具、濫用AI聊天機器人接觸受害者，意圖發動挖礦攻擊
articles.summary: 在過往挖礦軟體攻擊當中，駭客可能選擇透過搜尋引擎最佳化中毒（SEO Poisoning）來接觸目標，盡可能地讓更多使用者上當，讓挖礦活動的收益最大化，不過有人採取更為細緻的方法過濾用戶，試圖接觸擁有更多GPU運算能力的電腦。
